purpose: Recompute character-level Boundary Reference accounting after frozen explicit non-claim review, adjudication, omission resolution, and the no-op Boundary Correction Gate.
eligible_character_definition: Every non-whitespace Python string code point in each frozen source anchor.
protocol_excluded_definition: An uncovered whitespace-only character; protocol-excluded characters may not contain any eligible non-whitespace character.

explicit_non_claim_construction.exact_agreement: Use the shared frozen reason code and preserve both independent reviewer rationales.
explicit_non_claim_construction.adjudicated_disagreement: Use the frozen B3 final classification, reason code, and rationale.
explicit_non_claim_construction.b4_resolved_as_non_claim: Use the frozen B4 resolution and rationale; because B4 does not emit a non-claim reason code, deterministically assign other_explained_non_claim.

success_effect: Authorize a separately versioned Boundary Gold Freeze stage; do not freeze Boundary Gold inside this rerun.
